blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: You know what that kid wants from you?
I thought about it. Really thought.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: He wants me to react. He wants to see what I do when I don't have backup.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: He wins either way. He either gets the fight he wanted or he gets to say he made me run.
Mr. Cole didn't say anything for a moment. I could tell that landed right.

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: So you already know how to think through it. The question is whether you trust what you know when your heart's going.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: It's different when you're actually in it.
He said it like it cost him something to agree. Like he knew from somewhere specific.

blocks.prompt: Mr. Cole glances over at you. 'You doing okay? The real answer.'

options.label: "Not really. I been scared every day this week."
Shrug. Look out the window. Don't answer.
"What would you have done? At my age?"
